name: Roux 24x24 Garage Shed Plan - A Modern Lean-To Garage with Warm Contemporary Style
open_features: A bold single-pitch roof creates a sleek profile, excellent drainage, and high wall clearance for storage, shelving, and workspace flexibility.
Straightforward framing, intuitive layouts, and simplified build steps make this structure ideal for both first-time builders and seasoned DIYers.
Wide Overhead Garage Door + Walk-In Entry
A modern, paneled garage door provides easy access for vehicles and equipment, while a separate side door improves daily convenience.
Rich brown wood siding, white trim, and industrial-style gooseneck lights give the Roux a high-end, contemporary lodge appearance.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Roux Garage Shed Plan - a 24x24 modern garage and workspace solution designed with clean architectural simplicity, warm wood tones, and everyday practicality. Featuring a streamlined single-slope roof, rich stained horizontal siding, and a wide overhead garage door, the Roux delivers modern elegance with rugged, real-world utility. Whether you're creating a spacious vehicle bay, full workshop, equipment storage hub, or multi-purpose hobby studio,...
